## Summary

Describe the change and why it helps skill users.

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `README.md` if the public-facing workflow changed
- [ ] Updated `README.ja.md` if the Japanese guidance also changed
- [ ] Updated `SKILL.md` or `references/` when the troubleshooting logic changed
- [ ] Kept commands and file links accurate
- [ ] Confirmed the repository QA workflow still matches the current file layout
